MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-13-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT ETHELJIVE GUEVARA'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF PRESENTED SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE REGARDING PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING ON THE MERITS. THE COURT NEITHER 'WEIGH[S] CREDIBILITY [NOR] COMPARE[S] THE WEIGHT OF THE EVIDENCE. RATHER, [WE] ACCEPT AS TRUE THE EVIDENCE FAVORABLE TO THE PLAINTIFF [CITATION] AND EVALUATE THE DEFENDANT'S EVIDENCE ONLY TO DETERMINE IF IT HAS DEFEATED THAT SUBMITTED BY THE PLAINTIFF AS A MATTER OF LAW.' [CITATION.]" JAY V. MAHAFFEY (2013) 218 CAL.APP.4TH 1522, 1536.PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM.JUDGE: RICHARD A. KRAMER, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2014 Continued To Apr-09-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:DEFENDANT ETHELJIVE GUEVARA's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. Plaintiff presented sufficient evidence regarding probability of prevailing on the merits. The Court neither 'weigh[s] credibility [nor] compare[s] the weight of the evidence. Rather, [we] accept as true the evidence favorable to the plaintiff [citation] and evaluate the defendant's evidence only to determine if it has defeated that submitted by the plaintiff as a matter of law.' [Citation.]" Jay v. Mahaffey (2013) 218 Cal.App.4th 1522, 1536.Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form.Judge: Richard A. Kramer, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-12-2013 Continued To Feb-13-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stephen Sherman, Esq., of Sheppard, Rosen,Iziel & Sussman (415-296-0900 ext 24) for Etheljive Guevara, Defendant and Moving party.
Joseph Bravo, Esq., (415-512-6700) for Jahzeel Rodriguez, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Per stipulation of parties, DEFENDANT ETHELJIVE GUEVARA's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is continued to 02/13/14. Parties waive notice. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
